content: The Bollinger Band squeeze in the Russell 2000 during December 2023 preceded a significant breakout in early 2024. Treasury bond volatility compression as measured by Bollinger Bands signaled the rate volatility explosion in Q1 2024. Bitcoin's walk along the upper Bollinger Band during the Q1 rally demonstrated trend continuation dynamics. Recent enhancements to Bollinger Bands incorporate implied volatility for options-aware analysis.
